x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Now Assist configuration requires the sn_now_assist.admin role. Without it, admins cannot configure prompts, manage AI interactions, or adjust Now Assist settings -- blocking all Now Assist setup work.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Assign the sn_now_assist.admin role to Now Assist configuration administrators via sys_user_has_role_list.do. Limit this role to designated AI platform administrators. This role is required to configure all Now Assist features.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_4a03a33acfd903108935fb251d851cf2
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE">
<ai_justification><![CDATA[Now Assist configuration requires the sn_now_assist.admin role. Without it, admins cannot configure prompts, manage AI interactions, or adjust Now Assist settings -- blocking all Now Assist setup work.]]></ai_justification>
<check_name>Now Assist Admin Role Assignment</check_name>
<check_script><![CDATA[(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var ga = new GlideAggregate('sys_user_has_role');
    ga.addQuery('role.name', 'sn_now_assist.admin');
    ga.addQuery('inherited', false);
    ga.addAggregate('COUNT');
    ga.query();
    var count = ga.next() ? parseInt(ga.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var actualValue = count + ' user(s) with sn_now_assist.admin role';

    if (count >= 1) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: count + ' user(s) have the sn_now_assist.admin role. Now Assist configuration access is in place — administrators can configure prompts and AI interaction settings.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'No users have the sn_now_assist.admin role. This role is required to configure Now Assist prompts and AI interaction settings — without it no Now Assist setup work can proceed.'
        };
    }
})]]></check_script>
<is_active>true</is_active>
<is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive>
<is_manual>false</is_manual>
<module>PLATFORM</module>
<number>CHK0006121</number>
<order>170</order>
<remediation_guidance>Assign the sn_now_assist.admin role to Now Assist configuration administrators via sys_user_has_role_list.do. Limit this role to designated AI platform administrators. This role is required to configure all Now Assist features.</remediation_guidance>
<sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by>
<sys_created_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_created_on>
<sys_id>4a03a33acfd903108935fb251d851cf2</sys_id>
<sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count>
<sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by>
<sys_updated_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_updated_on>
</x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
